name: seg1-anime
prompt: [LIGHTING ANCHOR] 深夜凌晨2点。室内极暗，电脑屏幕蓝白光是主光源，映在角色脸上。窗外远处有微弱城市霓虹（暖色）。无日光、无室内灯。整体色调：深蓝+黑+微暖霓虹点缀。Genshin Impact 3D anime style. Tiny dark rental room, 10sqm. Chinese male, 25, short black hair, black-framed glasses, gray hoodie, sits at folding table typing on old laptop. Screen casts blue-white glow on his tired face. He rubs his eyes, stretches neck, then suddenly screen flashes — a translucent holographic panel appears mid-air showing「检测到宿主代码能力：S级。是否激活代码之神系统？」He freezes, eyes wide. Says in Chinese: "我一定是加班加傻了，出现幻觉了。" He reaches toward the panel hesitantly. Window shows distant city neon. Normal speed, natural pacing. Chinese Mandarin dialogue.
